Forms
FormLabel
Utilities
FocusScopePortalVisuallyHidden

Design Tokens

CSS custom properties (variables) that power the AudioGenius design system. All tokens use the --ag-* prefix and support both light and dark modes.

Usage

/* In your CSS */
.my-element {
  color: hsl(var(--ag-foreground));
  background: hsl(var(--ag-background));
  border-color: hsl(var(--ag-border));
}

/* In Tailwind (via theme extension) */
<div className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground" />

Base

PreviewNameVariableValueDescription
Background--ag-background
hsl(0 0% 100%)dark: hsl(240 10% 3.9%)
Page background color
Foreground--ag-foreground
hsl(240 10% 3.9%)dark: hsl(0 0% 98%)
Default text color

Brand

PreviewNameVariableValueDescription
Primary--ag-primary
hsl(262 83% 58%)dark: hsl(263 70% 50%)
Primary brand color
Primary Foreground--ag-primary-foreground
hsl(0 0% 98%)
Text on primary color
Secondary--ag-secondary
hsl(240 4.8% 95.9%)dark: hsl(240 3.7% 15.9%)
Secondary brand color
Secondary Foreground--ag-secondary-foreground
hsl(240 5.9% 10%)dark: hsl(0 0% 98%)
Text on secondary color

Semantic

PreviewNameVariableValueDescription
Destructive--ag-destructive
hsl(0 84.2% 60.2%)dark: hsl(0 62.8% 30.6%)
Danger / error color
Destructive Foreground--ag-destructive-foreground
hsl(0 0% 98%)
Text on destructive
Muted--ag-muted
hsl(240 4.8% 95.9%)dark: hsl(240 3.7% 15.9%)
Muted / subdued background
Muted Foreground--ag-muted-foreground
hsl(240 3.8% 46.1%)dark: hsl(240 5% 64.9%)
Muted text color
Accent--ag-accent
hsl(240 4.8% 95.9%)dark: hsl(240 3.7% 15.9%)
Accent / hover background
Accent Foreground--ag-accent-foreground
hsl(240 5.9% 10%)dark: hsl(0 0% 98%)
Text on accent

UI Chrome

PreviewNameVariableValueDescription
Card--ag-card
hsl(0 0% 100%)dark: hsl(240 10% 3.9%)
Card surface color
Card Foreground--ag-card-foreground
hsl(240 10% 3.9%)dark: hsl(0 0% 98%)
Text on card
Popover--ag-popover
hsl(0 0% 100%)dark: hsl(240 10% 3.9%)
Popover surface color
Popover Foreground--ag-popover-foreground
hsl(240 10% 3.9%)dark: hsl(0 0% 98%)
Text on popover
Border--ag-border
hsl(240 5.9% 90%)dark: hsl(240 3.7% 15.9%)
Default border color
Input--ag-input
hsl(240 5.9% 90%)dark: hsl(240 3.7% 15.9%)
Form input border color
Ring--ag-ring
hsl(262 83% 58%)dark: hsl(263 70% 50%)
Focus ring color

Charts

PreviewNameVariableValueDescription
Chart 1--ag-chart-1
hsl(262 83% 58%)dark: hsl(263 70% 65%)
Primary chart color
Chart 2--ag-chart-2
hsl(200 80% 50%)dark: hsl(200 75% 60%)
Secondary chart color
Chart 3--ag-chart-3
hsl(150 60% 45%)dark: hsl(150 55% 55%)
Tertiary chart color
Chart 4--ag-chart-4
hsl(30 90% 55%)dark: hsl(30 85% 65%)
Quaternary chart color
Chart 5--ag-chart-5
hsl(350 80% 55%)dark: hsl(350 75% 65%)
Quinary chart color

Spacing & Shape

PreviewNameVariableValueDescription
Radius--ag-radius
0.5rem
Base border radius

Typography

PreviewNameVariableValueDescription
AaFont Sans--ag-font-sans
"Inter"
Sans-serif font family
AaFont Mono--ag-font-mono
"JetBrains Mono"
Monospace font family
